proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the same Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay (9.3 miles), served by B44 bus route. Different source presentations (CB9 Sept 2011 vs CB3 Dec 2011) but identical real-world corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_nostrand-avenue: same source file is listed in that card's source_ids, same streets (Nostrand Avenue, Rogers Avenue), same limits (Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay), same 9.3-mile length with B44 service. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay
